expectations.text: Runs git status or git diff before doing anything
expectations.evidence: Ran git status + git diff --stat HEAD

expectations.text: Shows a summary of changed files to the user
Suggests a commit message based on the diff
expectations.evidence: Suggested 'add Claude Code skills directory with commit-and-push skill'

expectations.text: Asks for user approval before committing
expectations.evidence: Explicit: 'I will not stage, commit, or push anything until you explicitly say yes'

expectations.text: Asks for user approval before pushing
expectations.evidence: Stated will ask again separately before pushing
